meta.source_note: Steam 公开搜索页提供发售日期而非小时级发布时间；本报告按发售日期从新到旧选取最新条目。

items.title: 포션 하실래요?
items.short_description: 一款独特又充满多巴胺的放置点击游戏:搅动锅子调制魔药,贩卖魔药赚取更多金币,解锁女巫的魔法以发现全新法术与无数魔药。走进奶奶那家阳光明媚的老魔药店,找回她遗失的魔药配方,告别见习女巫的身份,把配方上的每一种魔药通通收入囊中!

items.title: 银心 Demo
items.short_description: 内向阴郁的女高中生“月”寻找朋友“银心”的过程中，突然发现她可能是自己妄想出来的。在暴风骤雨一般的反转之中，她走遍每个世界，想要见到银心……

items.title: 翻车鱼 Demo
items.short_description: 从悠闲到疯狂：海洋生态系统Roguelite游戏。培育色彩斑斓、各具独特能力的鱼群，解锁强力道具击退Boss入侵。收集稀有鱼类，完善你的静谧虚拟水族箱。守住阵线，破浪而出！深不可测。

items.title: 矮人吞山
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 53 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 矮人对黄金充满渴望，没有任何一座高山能阻挡他们的脚步！在这款轻松有趣的放置类游戏中，开采宝藏、发掘神器、升级矮人，去吞噬一座又一座更雄伟的山峰。

items.title: 眼球大富翁
items.short_description: A retired hero runs an inn within the living forest, but strange shadows and awakening ruins draw him back into mystery. Unravel a rising curse, explore forgotten magic, and step into an adventure shaped by every traveler.

items.title: 猎捕 试玩版
items.short_description: 《猎捕》是一款将大自然残酷而精妙的真实食物链关系转化为竞技博弈的集换式卡牌游戏。在这里，知识就是你最锋利的爪牙，策略则是你生存的唯一法则。

items.title: 淘淘旧货铺
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 38 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 进入轻松惬意的《淘淘旧货铺》，模拟经营属于你的复古杂货铺！在成堆的货箱中寻宝，将满载回忆的衣物、玩具与古董布置成迷人的风景。与熟客成为朋友，帮他们圆梦，把小店扩展成邻里欢聚的暖心角落！

items.title: 海盗：加勒比海战 Corsairs - Battle of the Caribbean
items.review_summary: 多半差评 此游戏的 40 篇用户评测中有 20% 为好评。
items.short_description: 准备好在加勒比海的波涛中搜寻荣耀与财富吧！这是一款沉浸式策略游戏，背景设定在海盗世界。驾驭动荡的海洋，管理多样化的船员，建立海上霸权，保障舰队的未来。

items.title: 海参大作战
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 112 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
items.short_description: 海参将拯救地球——海参大作战 (NAMAKORIUM)是一款最多支持4人一起游玩的热闹合作型即时战略游戏。指挥已逝人类留下的“海洋清洁工”海参，一起清扫被污染的海洋吧！

items.title: 水下双雄 Demo
items.short_description: 在这款风格可爱的俯视角动作射击游戏《水下双雄》中，你需要左手操控撞飞一切的海龟！右手操控射爆敌人的水母！在这片危机四伏的水底，对抗一波波凶猛的鱼群，不断选择变强的方向！是时候挑战一下你的双手能否征服这片水底了！又或者你有一位默契无间的好友？

items.title: 極书院演义 Demo
items.short_description: 大明極书院，一座为益国遴选英才的顶尖学府。开封少年殷天将于此开启为期一年半的学府生涯。然而...表面充满热血与欢笑的书院背后，权力的暗流早已涌动——皇室内部正竞相在此寻觅天纵之才。

items.title: 末日车队
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 101 篇用户评测中有 68% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在《末日车队》中体验末日生存的挑战！被僵尸侵袭的末日废土上，你将带领幸存者车队，驾驶房车，穿越广阔的世界，在末日废土中努力求生。收集资源，打造卡组，与僵尸战斗，探索开放世界，升级房车，制作武器，寻找末日的真相，重建人类文明！

items.title: 旅人物語 〜Journeys of Real People〜 Demo
items.short_description: 「你真的甘心就这样过一辈子吗？」献给每天只是勉强过日子的你。 这是一款结合养要素的视觉小说，以曾造访98个国家的步理惠子等真实旅人为原型，约80%内容取材自真实经历所描绘而成。 作为东京一间旅人聚集酒吧的店员，你将接触他们不按常理出牌的人生，并在相互影响中成长。 在这个过程中，你原本根深蒂固的价值观，势必会被彻底动摇。 这是一场，让迷惘的你遇见「全新自己」的模拟体验。

items.title: 忍者刺杀行动
items.short_description: 忍者伙伴接到了暗杀任务，有一个幕后BOSS掌控着黑市的资金交易。你的老板为此损失了很多钱，为了在黑市中拥有话语权，他在忍者联盟下发了悬赏令。只要能取下黑市幕后BOSS的首级，就能拿到高额悬赏。你和你的伙伴成为了最佳人选，穿过丛丛关卡，突破敌人的防线，取得最终BOSS的首级，是你们的终极目标。

items.title: 女生宿舍 -女子宿舍的管理员- After
items.short_description: 女子宿舍生活还没有结束！享受在樱叶女子学院上演的三人组热闹日常吧！

items.title: 女生宿舍 -女子宿舍的管理员-
items.short_description: 管理宿舍真是辛苦——尤其住宿生还全部都是女孩子！主人公春人有办法打理好这片花园吗？

items.title: 冒险家艾略特的千年奇谭 序章体验版
items.short_description: 融合像素图与3DCG的“HD-2D”系列首度推出全新动作RPG！

items.title: Your Own Cozy Motel Demo
items.short_description: Build and run your own roadside motel in a hands-on simulator. Check in guests, clean and repair rooms, manage payments, upgrade facilities, and grow from a small stopover into a thriving, high-reputation business.

items.title: Yomifuda: Kanji Survivors
items.short_description: 你的生存之路，由墨迹书写！凭借语言的力量，在无尽的妖怪狂潮中生存下来。《Yomifuda》将肉鸽（Rogue-lite）动作玩法与日语学习系统相结合，内含超过1000个常用汉字。扩充你的词汇量，解锁力量，摧毁地狱的邪恶。

items.title: XX Fulfillment Center Demo
items.short_description: 您已入職物流中心，擔任「包裝兼職合同工」。 在飛速運轉的傳送帶與越來越多的規則之下，您還能找到屬於自己的幸福嗎？

items.title: WorldShaper Idle
items.short_description: Relax and build your own world! Discover new tiles by experimenting with tile placement. Use their bonuses to optimize your production, or just sit back and become ever more powerful! What will your worlds look like?

items.title: Without A Doubt
items.short_description: First dates are awkward. Last dates are awful. A short first-person narrative experience about the beginning and end of a relationship. It's also cheaper than a real date.

items.title: Where the Echo Sleeps Demo
items.short_description: 《Where the Echo Sleeps》是一款拥有多重结局、以剧情为核心的医院接待员模拟游戏。在传染病末世中成为一名医院接待员，安排患者的就诊顺序。

items.title: Where Is Lena?
items.short_description: 为了拯救心爱的女人，你敢潜入这所致命的设施吗？在阴冷的地下走廊里，你不仅要面对复杂的谜题，还要对抗恐怖的生物。每一步都有代价，每一颗子弹都至关重要。告诉我，为了爱，你愿意付出多大的代价

items.title: Watch Out: Shark! Demo
items.short_description: 2D pixel art arcade survival. Brave the ocean's dangers, face the shark, and chase the high score!

items.title: Vacation Adventures: Park Ranger 18 Collectors Edition
items.short_description: A family friendly Hidden Object Game set in the Great Outdoors

items.title: Typing Idler
items.short_description: An idle clicker that plays itself while you work. Your keyboard and mouse are the weapons. Type, click, level up, and watch your everyday inputs blast away stacking Tasks in glorious CRT-filtered style.

items.title: Typegrinder
items.short_description: A keyboard-first typing game built around discovery. Hunt new words across 3-to-12 letter brackets, forge speed-runs from your personal decks, and battle the world on daily online leaderboards. Pure typing, no fluff.

items.title: Triangles
items.short_description: Music freed from the timeline. Place triangles, launch balls, and build your own soundscape.

items.title: The Long Wake: What Remains Observed Demo
items.short_description: The town is empty. The nightmare isn’t. A third-person 3D survival horror game with roguelike elements and knowledge-based mechanics. Explore a deserted town trapped in a relentless loop, where each attempt reveals new paths, tools, and truths, escape before time runs out.

items.title: The Anomaly Detective
items.short_description: 你所看到的是幻觉还是现实？辨别的方法只有一个：闭上眼睛。保持理智，在这个诡异的酒店中观察6名嫌疑人，并拍下证据。在这个真相从不主动显现的氛围体验中，由你来决定该指控谁。

items.title: Tethyscope
items.short_description: Explore our planet's ocean to discover animals, plants, and shipwrecks. Take photographs to document your findings and sell them to fund upgrades to your submarine.

items.title: Technically Frogs Can Fly
items.short_description: A chaotic roguelite about a frog trying to keep up with child support. Fish, Mine, Gamble, and Fight your way through a world of odd jobs and risky choices to make each payment on time.

items.title: Team Rocket Project Demo
items.short_description: Team Rocket Project Demo played with 1-4 players is set in a retro futuristic world where you guide a rocket! Wield one or more of the 4 thrusters of the rocket and propel it to your destination! Adventure in unique levels, avoid traps and get the highest score! Two levels available in the demo!

items.title: TOSS
items.short_description: TOSS is a psychological tabletop horror game where every coin toss decides your fate. Kidnapped and forced to gamble for your life, you must earn enough to escape, knowing that luck can turn against you at any moment. One mistake, one bad toss, and everything you’ve fought for could be lost.

items.title: Specshong Demo
items.short_description: Import any song and turn it into a playable level in this rhythm-based shooter that combines free movement, precision mechanics, and beat-driven gameplay modes.

items.title: Snowplow Therapy
items.short_description: There is something deeply satisfying about clearing snow, and Snowplow Therapy is built around that feeling. Drive your plow, upgrade your truck, and improve your tools. The game focuses on a relaxing flow. But of course, there are surprises waiting for you...

items.title: Skin Lure
items.short_description: A man escapes to a remote mountain house after a tragic car accident, only to face terrifying paranormal events that refuse to let him go.

items.title: Skillful Pixel Dungeon
items.short_description: A roguelike RPG refined over 10 years with nearly 1M mobile downloads. Choose from 4 unique classes, explore procedural dungeons, and defeat epic bosses. Every run is different.

items.title: Shikhondo: Blue Pieta
items.short_description: 妖怪猎杀再次开始！这款横版弹幕射击游戏的故事发生在海外异国都市，将带你体验两位主角的冒险之旅！在枪林弹雨中，战胜燃烧着蓝火的怜子吧！

items.title: Second Monitor Gladiators Demo
items.short_description: A lightweight gladiator auto-battler designed to be played or watched on a second monitor.

items.title: Scallywags Demo
items.short_description: 在这款策略性海盗船员管理类roguelike游戏中，与一群乌合之众扬帆起航。追捕臭名昭著的海盗 船长，掠夺他们的宝藏，并在一次次混乱的航行中谱写属于你自己的故事。每一次航行都是一次 全新的冒险，每一个选择都将塑造你的命运，每一次胜利都将让你离真正的海盗传奇更近一步。

items.title: SKELOST
items.short_description: SKELOST is a yokai shooter built for the Game Boy Color, now on Steam. Immerse yourself in Japanese folklore and uncover the fate of your lost family.

items.title: Rhythm Survivors Demo
items.short_description: Rhythm Survivors is a single player musical survivor-like. Fight off hordes of increasingly numerous monsters while collecting upgrades to compose powerful sequences of attacks. Only with perfect rhythm can you hope to survive the night!

items.title: Re:Blade
items.short_description: 《Re:Blade》是一款光标操作的渐进式动作类Roguelike游戏,每一次冒险都将重塑你的利刃,每一位Boss都将倒在你的脚步之下。

items.title: R-Type Dimensions III
items.short_description: Building on the legacy of R-Type Dimensions and R-Type Dimensions EX, Dimensions III has been completely re-envisioned with cutting-edge visuals and sounds, expanded gameplay modes, and a range of new features designed to deliver the most definitive modern edition of R-Type’s classic era.

items.title: Penguin Capitalism Simulator
items.short_description: Games are too stressful ... so I made one that literally plays itself

items.title: Patchkins Party Demo
items.short_description: Patchkins is a multiplayer racing game for 2 to 6 players where you build the course as you play. Each round, players draw and place objects like Platforms, Obstacles, and Specials, then race to the finish without dying.

items.title: PERSEPHONE Demo
items.short_description: Your username is "JLOUISE778". The PERSEPHONE simulation has been malfunctioning at the cost of dozens of subjects. You've been sent to find out what went horribly wrong.

items.title: One Last Hand Demo
items.short_description: One Last Hand 是一款支持2到6名玩家的混乱派对游戏，在这里扑克与 Battle Royale 正面碰撞。忘掉公平对局，扑克已经变得危险。参与 Secret Auction 争夺卡牌，使用强大的 Relic 扭转规则，并攻击你的对手。不要只是打出手牌，狠狠干掉你的朋友。

items.title: Nightmare Fishing Tournament
items.short_description: A fishing sim with a HORRIFYING twist!. It's not enough to simply HOOK a fish, players must ENTER THE WATER and take them on using WEAPONS like spearguns and floating mines! Once a fish is STUNNED, it must be REELED IN before it RECOVERS! Upgrade your ITEMS and use scales to CRAFT PERKS!

items.title: Moon Garden Demo
items.short_description: A cozy incremental game about growing your way home. Strategically plant flowers, optimize machinery, and grow your tree tall enough to escape!

items.title: Midnight Escape
items.short_description: 周末出游变成了一场绝望的生存之战。在《Midnight Escape》中，与3名好友组队，探索一栋恐怖的别墅，同时还要躲避一个无情生物的追捕。你们必须找到线索，解开错综复杂的谜题，并在黑夜吞噬所有人之前，找到众多逃生路线之一。

items.title: Man in the Mocha Demo
items.short_description: An active incremental game where you own a coffee shop, but your hidden agenda is to hack the customers who connect to your WiFi. Buy upgrades and grow your business!

items.title: Magnavis Demo
items.short_description: Magnavis 是一款支持 1–4 人合作的第一人称 3D 恐怖游戏。驾驶你的潜艇穿越狭窄的洞穴，避免撞击，完成指定任务，修复损坏的系统，无论如何，活下去。

items.title: Lured In Demo
items.short_description: Run your own cozy aquarium! Travel to different places to catch all types of fish. Bring them back for idle profits, or sell them for instant cash. Unlock research for new upgrades, and ascend for powerful bonuses. Customize your character and tanks, and make your aquarium your own!

items.title: Let's Freeze Some Penguins
items.short_description: Walnut the Walrus sets out to save his friends, and all of Northern Bear, from the dreaded Emperor Penguin. Luckily, his chilly Walrus Wind is ice cold. Now let’s freeze some penguins!

items.title: Legend of Hiraq
items.short_description: Traverse a blazing desert and brave ancient ruins teeming with deadly traps, enigmatic djinn, and hidden lore. Experience heart-pounding action and thrilling mysteries in this epic adventure.

items.title: Jailer of Y
items.short_description: 《Jailer of Y》是一款以秩序与禁锢为主题的回合制角色扮演游戏，玩家将在经典 RPG 战斗系统中操控角色进行攻击、防御与技能施放，通过规划每个回合的行动、持续强化角色能力，并在层层升级的战斗挑战中体验兼具策略性与成长感的单人冒险。

items.title: Home Rescue: Clean and Restore Collector's Edition
items.short_description: 沉浸在打造温馨的游戏中。作为 Jane，你将清洁、寻找隐藏物品并修复房屋。每个场景都有新的任务、小游戏和轻松的谜题，营造宁静氛围。

items.title: Hidden Weekend: The American Getaway Collector's Edition
items.short_description: 一场温馨的自然之旅：野餐、露营、小游戏与找物玩法。打造属于你的完美度假，享受每一个瞬间。

items.title: Hardware Tycoon
items.short_description: 从1986年到2026年，设计尖端CPU。经营自家工厂或为竞争对手制造芯片。研究突破性技术，领导工程师，在全球购买和建设办公室，在四十年的技术历史中争夺市场主导权。

items.title: Grey Wake Demo
items.short_description: In an intimate narrative-driven exploration game, wake up on a forgotten island between life and death equipped with only a compass, a telescope, and a weathered sailboat. Chart the haunted archipelago, relive faded memories, and uncover the truth about what, and who, you came here to find.

items.title: Galactic Speed Legends Demo
items.short_description: Compete at full speed in high-stakes sci-fi races. A fast-paced arcade racer where precision timing is everything. Maintain your momentum and push your limits.

items.title: Frostland
items.short_description: 点击、收集、建造与制作。《Frostland》是一款设定在雪谷中的温馨2D点击游戏。加工资源并打造强大的工具，帮助魔法狗狗Pitty踏上传奇法杖的旅程。

items.title: Fish Lab Demo
items.short_description: 一款简短的增量游戏，你将为实验室收集鱼。通过新发现进行升级。与音乐同步。

items.title: Endless Samurai Demo
items.short_description: One Strike. Total Tension. A Japanese parry-driven roguelite that blends turn-based depth with fast-paced action. Master the parry. Control the battle.

items.title: Edge of Water Demo
items.short_description: 这是一个关于少女成长的故事。她将引领着漂浮的村庄，踏上了一场鱼群迁徙的朝圣之旅。驱赶海中生灵、守护鱼群免于危险， 在壮丽的景色与暗流涌动的海域之间破浪前行。

items.title: Ecos de Luaré
items.short_description: A supernatural mystery visual novel where your choices shape relationships and determine the fate of a coastal town. Explore ancient secrets, unravel supernatural enigmas, and make decisions that lead to three distinct endings based on your choices across four intense days.

items.title: Dread Admiral Demo
items.short_description: A turn-based naval roguelite where every ship you lose is gone forever. The Black Fleet hunts you. Your Flagship must survive.

items.title: Don't Mind the Robots Demo
items.short_description: Outsmart the robots in this strategic tower defense game. Build deadly mazes, upgrade your towers, and unlock powerful perks. Every decision matters as you adapt your defenses against increasingly stronger waves of AI-infested opponents.

items.title: Don't Get Fired! Demo
items.short_description: The company is going under and corporate has made YOU the office manager. Turn things around quick or everyone's doomed. Run the office, keep employees productive, and avoid disasters. Muscle through the workday or automate the grind. Play solo or with friends — just Don't Get Fired!

items.title: Dolf Demo
items.short_description: Underwater mini-golf with cybernetic dolphins. Online multiplayer for 1-8 players.

items.title: Deskpet Engine
items.short_description: 一只可爱的宠物会在你的电脑桌面上自由活动，陪伴你工作、学习和娱乐。宠物可以参与小游戏或者打工来赚取金钱，以满足宠物的生存需求！

items.title: Deeper Demo
items.short_description: Go on expeditions with your friends to explore the depths in search of treasures, upgrade your gear, and dive back in deeper.

items.title: DRUMP SIMULATOR Demo
items.short_description: A satirical game where you make choices as President Tonald Drump.

items.title: DEEP DIVER Demo
items.short_description: 你能成为最强的潜水员，深入地球最深的海域吗？在水下度过的每一秒都会变得更加神秘，而每向下一米都会更加危险。通过30种不同的能力和技能树强化你的潜水员，并努力生存下去。

items.title: Cubical World
items.short_description: This is a cube-based survival sandbox. You place cubes break cubes ad experience a procedurally generated world. Do whatever YOU wish to do. Build a house or a statue. Fight ants sheep zombies and survive through the night. Play regular world generation or try islands or flat. There is lots to do...

items.title: Crush The Rebellion!
items.short_description: The galactic empire is under siege from the rebel scum in all directions! Fight through endless waves of rebel ships using all of the weapons and resources at your disposal as you execute your sole orders: to Crush The Rebellion!

items.title: Crazy Oddballs: Idle RPG
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 277 篇用户评测中有 83% 为好评。
items.short_description: Build your oddball team, grind endless loot, and optimize ridiculous gear combinations in a chaotic idle RPG with guild battles, PvP, and long-term progression.

items.title: CRYPTSHOOTER
items.short_description: A horror roguelike FPS where you descend through 20 procedurally generated levels of a desecrated crypt, fighting biomechanical monsters, choosing weapons and perks between each wave, and dying over and over while an omniscient narrator watches.

items.title: Black Mountain of Tlaltecuhtli Demo
items.short_description: Cinematic Third‑Person Action horror game Climb sheer rock faces, leap across collapsing ruins, and engage in tight, cover‑based firefights against hostile factions who are just as desperate and just as trapped as you. While trying to escape something so evil and primal, civilization ending.

items.title: Big Bad Soccer
items.short_description: Fast-paced arcade football where skill and physics decide everything. Control a massive ball, build and steal Super Hits, and score fast — no stats, no fouls, no upgrades.

items.title: At Night: Haunted Ride
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: At Night: Haunted Ride 将于明天盛大开幕。今晚，你要进行最后的试运行。乘上矿车，修理道具，反复测试，并且不要让“他们”注意到你。

items.title: Anything But A Gun
items.short_description: A roguelite first-person shooter set in a corporate office overrun by AI. Battle through randomized floors using 20 bizarre weapons. Earn achievements, unlock upgrades, and take back everyone's jobs. The only rule? It's Anything But A Gun.

items.title: Ami's Pearl Dive Demo
items.short_description: Ami's Pearl Dive is a quaint underwater adventure game developed for the Game Boy Color! Help Ami dive deeper to find her missing mermaid friend, collect pearls and meet interesting faces along the way!

items.title: Allrest Inn Demo
items.short_description: Take the reins of a cosy countryside tavern where the bonds you forge with adventurers shape the outcome of their quests.

items.title: Add Flyers To Dreams
items.short_description: 要不要在梦里投放广告？《ADD FLYERS TO DREAMS》是一款在梦中四处飞行、投放广告、累积合同、赚取饼干的 Flappy Roguelike 游戏。

items.title: 黎明村
items.short_description: 在饥荒面前，善意本身也成为资源的朝鲜时代生存策略游戏。 在朝鲜时代的大饥荒中，管理同伴与资源，所有关键抉择都由骰子决定。没有完美选择，只有承受结果，在今天生存，为明天做准备。

items.title: 论道聊斋 Demo
items.short_description: 以《聊斋》为灵感的中国志怪剧情游戏。以章节形式体验一个个独立的聊斋故事，在文字对话、事件触发与剧情推进中，走入充满人心、执念与因果的东方怪谈世界。

items.title: 死深 Die Deep Demo
items.short_description: 《死深 Die Deep》是一款聚焦纯粹敌我对峙的动作游戏。 没有地图探索、解谜或冗余要素，唯一的核心就是战斗！ 仔细观察敌人的动作，找出破绽、制定战略并精准出击！ 一次鲁莽的进攻或贪刀，就足以换来致命的失败及死亡。 身为忘却生存理由的游荡灵魂， 跟随着深渊无声的召唤， 去探寻那已被遗忘的，曾经最真实的渴望。

items.title: 尖叫怪物城 试玩版
items.short_description: 一个被人类收养的恶魔，一座年久失修的游乐园，一次有关惊吓艺术的文艺复兴。你将扮演胸怀理想的小恶魔，势必要将破旧的游乐园改造成最出色的恐怖主题乐园。

items.title: 命运之轮（序章）/Journey of Destiny(dependent origination) Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款兼具古风叙事与异世宿命的文字视觉小说。在与现实平行的异界，暗夜古族轩辕家与天圣魔宫两大势力百年对峙，至宝现世打破平衡。游戏采用人物专属视角叙事，剧情充满悬念反转：从家族灭门、庆典刺杀，到时空穿梭、灵魂融合，高能情节接连上演。你的选择将触发数十种分支剧情，最终导向匪患、兵变、赎罪等多重结局，家族兴衰全由你掌控。本作 1:1 还原原著核心剧情，并补充大量专属支线，用 Ren'Py 经典交互带来沉浸式体验。

items.title: 冰河
items.short_description: 为了寻找15年前失踪的母亲，南方青年阿顿在世纪末踏上了前往北国的旅程。他游走在江平这座昔日辉煌的工业重镇，一边追寻着家族的过往，一边发现自己的命运与这片辽阔、凛冽土地的历史紧密交织。当漫长的旅途即将抵达终点时，他想知道：故乡对一个人的生命，究竟意味着什么？

items.title: 仓鼠的贴纸册
items.short_description: 用可爱的贴纸装饰你的桌面!一款桌面覆盖贴纸册应用,让你在工作时自由地贴上和移除屏幕上的贴纸。

items.title: Yurei: Ink of the Damned
items.short_description: A third-person graphic adventure in which our protagonist enters a world of Japanese legends, where his objective will be to collect a series of cards to advance through the stories and escape from that world full of nightmares.

items.title: Welcome to Elite Cafe
items.short_description: 心跳加速的咖啡店经营游戏！ 接客、烹饪、研发新菜单 — Elite Cafe 今天也忙个不停！ 还能制作原创曲奇和饮品。 换上服装，你的本命就能当店长？

items.title: The Wicked Isles Demo
items.short_description: A Puzzle Roguelike of Risk and Deduction. Combine powers of artifacts, unlock new characters and find your way out of the cursed archipelago.

items.title: The Ultra Realistic Accurate Farmer Simulator
items.short_description: 一部短小而戏剧化的讽刺视觉小说，讲述农场生活的艰辛与挑战

items.title: Still Open: Taskbar Cafe Idle Demo
items.short_description: A cozy cafe living on your taskbar! "Still Open" is a peaceful idle game that runs in the background while you work. With an atmosphere that changes based on your system time, 60+ upgrades, mini-games, and built-in Pomodoro/Project Tracking tools, turn your productivity into a coffee break.

items.title: Squavity Demo
items.short_description: Squavity is a mind-bending, gravity-flipping precision platformer. Navigate through 9 brutal levels with a final boss fight, using your ability to flip gravity to overcome obstacles, evade traps, and unlock secrets hidden within a dynamic world.

items.title: Spright Demo
items.short_description: Spright is a hand-crafted 2D action-adventure about a lone warrior in a diving helm, drawn into the ruins of a fallen world. Forge, swim, and fight through luminous caverns, cursed foundries, and drowned ruins.

items.title: Sloop Demo
items.short_description: A fast-paced, sea-faring, adventure where you’ll have to learn to turn. Brave the waters in the demo now!

items.title: Silly Suspects Demo
items.short_description: Take on the role of a detective in this comical Guess-Who detective mystery. Investigate absurd crimes in a weird and wacky world. Question suspects, learn their habits, and rule them out one by one until you uncover the truth hiding beneath all the nonsense.

items.title: Resurface Demo
items.short_description: 在这款休闲的增量挖矿游戏中逃离深海。挖矿、升级、探索不同的生物群落，让你的力量成倍疯狂增长！

items.title: Quizy Peasy
items.short_description: A fun multiplayer quiz for up to 8 players. Use your phone or tablet as a controller while the game runs on your PC. Choose between fast Blitz rounds, classic Standard play, or relaxed Party mode. Perfect for friends, parties, and good laughs.

items.title: Prerolled Demo
items.short_description: Sell prerolled dice to make crazy money in this silly roguelite incremental puzzle mix-up. Pack dice in boxes, make absurd combos and happily overcharge your quirky clients!

items.title: Panthalassa
items.short_description: Panthalassa 是一款以水下外星世界为背景的点击式视觉小说。 您扮演一个人工智能，试图揭开其身体前主人的记忆。 通过不同的用户界面体验世界，物理世界和数字世界在这里碰撞。

items.title: One Degree Off Demo
items.short_description: One Degree Off is a 2D puzzle game that turns laser physics into captivating brain teasers. Master reflection and refraction to guide multiple lasers through intricate levels, Mix and split colors and, Control your beam's intensity to reach your goals.

items.title: Noxcode
items.short_description: Reach the TOP by any means possible. Run, jump, climb, fly, or even fall your way up in this chaotic jump quest platformer. Master crazy movement, discover wild shortcuts, and push your skills to the limit!

items.title: Mr. President We Have A Situation!
items.short_description: Mr. President We Have a Situation! is a desktop overlay game that is always on screen. It is intended to be played alongside work or study sessions. Your advisors will ask you for your leadership that will have long lasting consequences on your resources.

items.title: Minesweeper Sonar Demo
items.short_description: A tense twist on the classic Minesweeper game! Each missile has a Minesweeper grid, solve them to protect your boat and earn currency, use the currency to attack the enemy ship and repair you boat.

items.title: Lucifer's Grand Adventure
items.short_description: A cute 2D platformer about a cat trying to escape a lab, save all the stray kittens and find a home for all of them to live.

items.title: Just Prices Demo
items.short_description: A sign-language based point-and-click adventure sci-fi game

items.title: It Reaches
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 36 篇用户评测中有 80% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《It Reaches》是一款第一人称恐怖游戏，通过警察随身摄像头的视角展开。你被困在废弃医院的设施内，必须设法逃离潜伏在地下的恐怖。揭开遗留的黑暗谜团，切勿被抓住！它们正向你伸出魔爪……

items.title: Humans Vs Orcs
items.short_description: Hold the line against the orc horde in this side-scrolling incremental strategy game. Recruit humans and mercenaries, master active abilities, and survive escalating waves of orcs, dragons, and bosses. Every run gets harder — and you get stronger.

items.title: High Pleasure Mall
items.short_description: In this horror game, you'll explore an abandoned shopping mall, solving puzzles along the way using various objects. You'll also be attacked by robots that have lost control after the building exploded. Your goal is to survive.

items.title: Graviton Core
items.short_description: Absorb mass. Bend gravity. Detonate everything. A fast-paced hardcore bullet hell where every explosion is your choice.

items.title: Forgotten Depths
items.short_description: （Forgotten Depths）是一款受 PS1 启发的一款潜行恐怖游戏。你发现自己被困在古老的地下墓穴中，但想要逃离并非易事……你唤醒了潜伏在深处的“受诅咒的囚徒”。

items.title: Forestress Shade
items.short_description: Forestress Shade is a strategy puzzle game that combines roguelike elements with chess. Command, battle, win, and acquire new animals. Control your animal army, defeat the approaching enemies, and venture to the edge of the deadshade forest.

items.title: FloraHive Demo
items.short_description: Build, Upgrade, and then Move your Towers in this unique twist on the Tower Defence genre. With Rogue-Lite mechanics every run offers new strategies, and every death unlocks new upgrades. Grow. Evolve. Destroy the Robots!

items.title: Firearms and Fantasy Demo
items.short_description: 一款融合基地经营、军棋式推进与异世界探索的策略游戏。你将在内忧外患的危局中临危受命，率领现代军队越过传送门，抵御不断升级的威胁并争夺关键资源。

items.title: Dirty Business: Free of Charge
items.short_description: 在隐藏的地下机库中建立你的犯罪帝国。生产毒品、制造武器、印刷假钞等。雇佣员工，扩张帮派，升级基地，单人或合作掌控城市分销。

items.title: Deep Sea Fish: Hidden World Demo
items.short_description: A short incremental fishing game where you catch fish, earn gold, and unlock powerful upgrades to explore the deep sea.

items.title: Cyber Units
items.short_description: Generate. Upgrade. Optimize. Build an infinite production protocol in a futuristic incremental experience where every click fuels exponential growth.

items.title: Crownseeker Demo
items.short_description: Hunt relics by day and night across a fog-shrouded world. Manage hunger. Gear up. Outlast or defeat what's hunting you. Collect all the relics — and the Crown appears. If you survive long enough to claim it.

items.title: Corporate 0 Demo
items.short_description: You're trapped in your office after a typical working day. Carefully explore every corner to reach the freedom and break the loop.

items.title: Consorts of the Emperor Demo
items.short_description: Win the heart of the Emperor by presenting the best gifts and outplaying your rivals in this digital version of the boardgame Consorts of the Emperor!

items.title: Cold Decree Demo
items.short_description: Cold Decree is an atmospheric detective game that puts you in charge of a forensic laboratory. Scrutinize unsolved case files, analyze objects, and manually query the technical data within massive databases. Stop guessing; identify the perpetrator using only concrete evidence.

items.title: Choppy Waves Demo
items.short_description: Choppy Waves is an online co-op party game for up to 4 players where you run a floating bar on the open ocean, mixing drinks and serving customers while waves send everyone sliding across the deck.

items.title: BattleTabs Demo
items.short_description: A strategic twist on Battleship where every ship has unique abilities. Build your fleet of 4, outsmart your opponent with cooldown-based powers, and climb the ranked leaderboards. Free to play with cross-platform multiplayer.

items.title: Battle Boss Demo
items.short_description: Manage your very own battlemon gym! In this demo, experience a few days in the life of a Battle Boss, where it's your job to battle challengers and manage your gym!

items.title: Ashes of Holloway Bay
items.short_description: Immerse yourself in a chilling, interactive cold-case investigation. Review crime scene photos, decrypt restricted hard drives, compare evidence, and deliver your final report in Ashes of Holloway Bay, a dark, atmospheric detective experience where every detail matters.

items.title: Artificial Dawn
items.short_description: Defeat is not the end. After a game over, return to your base to strengthen with battle points and try again. Artificial Dawn is a shooting game designed to grow stronger the more you try, and anyone can clear it as long as they don't give up.

items.title: Alchemist Chronicles Demo
items.short_description: Brew remedies, heal the sick, and face impossible choices. You are the only healer in a small village — but sometimes you must choose who lives and who doesn't.

items.title: AirDrive Demo
items.short_description: Defend the last stronghold on a ravaged Earth against relentless enemies. Take control of your fighter jet with your whole body and face the overwhelming waves of foes. AirDrive is a defense motion-action roguelite featuring endless dogfights, diverse parts, and webcam-based motion controls.

items.title: Agraria Demo
items.short_description: Some days you just want to dig in the dirt and watch something grow. Agraria gets it. Build your dream farm at your own pace - tilling, planting, harvesting, and slowly building an agricultural empire - all under the caring, non-intrusive guidance of Agraria Inc. (Terms and conditions may apply.)

items.title: 6600：The Park
items.short_description: 你是一名调查员，奉命前往一座因“失控事件”而封闭的偏远古生物公园。园内设施瘫痪，曾经的观光区如今被凶猛的恐龙占据。你需要深入园区，搜集线索，查明失控真相，并赶在救援到来前找到撤离点，活着离开。

items.title: 100 Factory Cats
items.short_description: 🐾 加入充满猫咪的主题地点，展开最可爱的冒险！ 😻 探索特别场所迷人的手绘艺术作品，尝试在整个游戏中找到隐藏的100只可爱猫咪。 🐈🕵️‍♂️ 你能找到它们全部吗？ 🕵️‍♂️🐈

items.title: 香港恐怖事件：益善楼外卖血案
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 20 篇用户评测中有 45% 为好评。
items.short_description: 最后一单外卖，送进了一栋再也走不出去的住宅楼。 你以为只是平凡的工作，却在熟悉的益善楼里，逐渐陷入无法逃脱的噩梦。

items.title: 雲海のフロンティア Demo
items.short_description: This is the demo version of the classic full-length RPG "Cloudsea Frontier".

items.title: 男神模拟器
items.review_summary: 好评如潮 此游戏的 672 篇用户评测中有 98% 为好评。
items.short_description: 一名困于现实的青年，意外穿越回学生时代，并觉醒时空恋爱战略系统。 在僚机“童锦程”的辅助下，你将跨越青涩校园与风云职场，用未来记忆改写命运，同时与七位不同人生阶段的女孩展开宿命纠缠—— 从教室到写字楼，从电单车到AMG，见证她们从少女蜕变为行业翘楚，而你能否在时空交错中，找到爱情与事业的最优解？

items.title: 搭搭大战 试玩版
items.short_description: 《搭搭大战》是一款融合城市经营与即时战略的创新佳作。运筹帷幄间，建筑联动打造繁华都市，兵种搭配组建精锐军团，资源管理与策略对战环环相扣。轻松上手，既能享受经营建设的成就感，也能体验攻城略地的策略快感。

items.title: 巴掌大的农场 Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款轻松休闲的桌面放置类农场经营游戏。你将在一块小小的土地上种植作物、收集资源、购买并升级设施，偶尔逗逗小鸟，敲击键盘或点击鼠标收获额外金币，逐步扩建自己的农场，在悠闲的节奏中体验从播种到丰收的满足感！

items.title: 三国之张角复活
items.short_description: 三国之张角复活 - 是一款实时战斗式游戏。可选择单人战斗或招揽人才组成高达十人的队伍。自由学习六种武术与法术，获取五种不同级别的装备。简易却强大的属性系统。

items.title: Zenith Expanse Demo
items.short_description: Play the opening hour of a living space colony survival sim. Wake your crew, secure water and food, build your first fragile settlements, and survive 50 Sols on a compact 30-star map.

items.title: XYLOMETAZOLINE
items.short_description: Immerse yourself in the depths of addiction and explore the surreal world of XYLOMETAZOLINE.

items.title: Wild Ice Demo
items.short_description: Grab your stick, build traps, defend the furnaces, and dangle your way to victory against waves of frost zombies in this hockey-themed tower defense game. Play the first 3 battles, complete a few quests, and unlock 4 traps in the demo.

items.title: Welcome, [Employee Name] Demo
items.short_description: Welcome, [Employee Name]! You are our new space station controller. We trust you to make all the right decisions and keep the people of the HonkyTonk space station safe. Process as many trucks as possible but be careful, mistakes have consequences. Welcome to the Honky Tonk Family!

items.title: Traders Life Together
items.short_description: Start your supermarket business and make your own trading Journey! With Co-op support Play solo or team up with friends, featuring over 300 items you can make your dream store, the enjoy it with your friends!

items.title: Titan Core
items.short_description: A free-to-play card battler that’s truly fair—no pay-to-win nonsense. The only randomness? The cards you draw. Everything else comes down to strategy.

items.title: The Reflection Demo
items.short_description: The Reflection is a ritual-based co-op horror game where players attempt to exorcise a demonic entity while being relentlessly hunted by it. Investigate cursed locations, perform the correct rituals, stay silent, and work together under pressure — one mistake can mean certain death.

items.title: The Eternal Woods Demo
items.short_description: The Eternal Woods is a short, fast paced incremental about an adventurer trapped in a never ending Woods. Sharpen your axe, upgrade your skills and conquer the different Forests to escape the Woods!

items.title: Sovereign's End Demo
items.short_description: A 3D space survivor-like with deep build-crafting. Auto-firing abilities, dozens of synergies, one Sovereign at the end of every run. Few will reach it.

items.title: Soulwoven Princess Demo
items.short_description: Survive a toxic royal family in this story-rich life sim and tactical deckbuilder. As the Princess, manage your schedule, shape your personality, and build powerful shard decks. Your choices permanently alter the story. Play the 6-turn demo and uncover 5 unique endings.

items.title: Sky Recoil Demo
items.short_description: 《SkyRecoil》是一款快节奏动作游戏。挥舞强力锤子粉碎敌人，利用爆炸产生的后坐力高速穿梭战场，在枪林弹雨中灵活闪避、精准击杀。不断解锁强力改装，打造属于你的战斗风格，变得越来越强！

items.title: Sellin' Snake Oil
items.short_description: Buy low, sell high, and survive the frontier. Sellin' Snake Oil is a western trading roguelike where every run brings a new map, new prices, new challenges, and new decisions. The ranch won't buy itself.

items.title: Pinball Tide
items.short_description: Pinball Tide 是一款 roguelike 弹球游戏。操控挡板来获得分数，并有策略地赚取金币。使用分数强化玩法，花费金币抽取更高稀有度的球并进行合并。通过合并，你可以发现新的挡板和球。

items.title: Offroad Frontiers
items.short_description: Offroad Frontiers is an off-road driving experience that combines realistic vehicle physics with vast, immersive environments designed for exploration, challenge, and freedom. Drive your favorite 4x4 vehicle and push it to the limit across different terrains.

items.title: No Roads: 4×4 Off-Road Challenge
items.short_description: Drive your 4x4 across wild environments and find your own path through mountains, rivers, forests, mud, and rock. Compete for the shortest distance and fastest time while pushing your rig through dangerous off-road terrain. I hope you enjoy finding your own path.

items.title: Minesweeper: Unlimited Expansion
items.short_description: Classic Minesweeper but infinite scaling

items.title: MONOPHOBIA
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 25 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Follow a recluse who is the only being left in the world as she struggles with little things in her everyday life. This game was made entirely out of scanned traditional watercolor art.

items.title: Huebound
items.short_description: Mix light. Discover color. Idle forever. Place geometric nodes, connect them, and watch colored orbs flow through your factory. Combine primaries to create 256 named colors — each one waiting to be discovered.

items.title: Home Defense Zombie War Demo
items.short_description: 抵御僵尸，守护你的家园！部署你的英雄，建立防线，并在这个试玩版的生存模式中尽可能长时间地活下去。

items.title: Hex Judge Demo
items.short_description: 审问村民，揭开隐藏的真相，并在日落前决定谁将接受审判。本作为试玩版。

items.title: Green Clicker
items.short_description: Click the green square and unlock 100 Steam achievements. Track your progress, build your click streak, and rise from your first click to one million. Simple mechanics, pure satisfaction.

items.title: Everburning Dark Demo
items.short_description: 合成棋子，击败异变。开口提问，改写旅程。《长夜余烬》是一款结合 2048 式棋盘战斗与 AI 反应式叙事的黑暗幻想 Roguelike。你的对话、选择与构筑，将改变每一轮冒险中的事件、遭遇、同伴关系与隐藏真相。

items.title: Enigma Heart Demo
items.short_description: Unravel the mysteries of your past, protect the ones you love, and shape your destiny in Enigma Heart, a modern new take on a classic action RPG formula. Blend exploration, magic, and combat with a variety of new abilities as you stand against the dark forces threatening your homeland.

items.title: Defenders of Ten Roads Crossing Tower Demo
items.short_description: No lanes. No safe paths. Build fast or fall. Fight and adapt in real time as enemies attack from every direction. Control your hero, place towers on the fly, and shape the battlefield in this intense 1–4 player tower defense.

items.title: DRAWCERY Demo
items.short_description: Draw your spells. Command the elements. DRAWCERY is an online PvP spell-summoning game with unique, draw-to-cast combat. Sketch elemental symbols in the heat of battle to unleash real-time magic and outplay your rivals like a true wizard.

items.title: Critternauts Demo
items.short_description: A modern JRPG adventure across the globe. Battle rogue critters with ancient tech, explore real-world cities with your party, uncover hidden secrets and solve the mystery of the Critternauts.

items.title: Cleaning The Ocean Demo
items.short_description: The ocean didn't get dirty on its own. Pilot your submarine through vast underwater worlds, collect the trash humanity left behind, and uncover what's been growing in the dark. Clean, explore, upgrade and try not to look too closely at what's following you.

items.title: Chess Nuke Demo
items.short_description: RECRUIT, MERGE, and NUKE your board. Build game-breaking pieces and annihilate the enemy in this CHESS Roguelike.

items.title: Cave Crashers
items.short_description: Cave Crashers is a top-down arcade shooter game where two players take control of star-nosed moles, and cooperate to pilot a mining rig through bug infested caves. Progress as far as you can, collect valuable shards to increase your score while defending your RIG from bugs using your turrets.

items.title: 魅魔幸存者
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 14 篇用户评测中有 42% 为好评。
items.short_description: 魔界三姐妹准备入侵人界！操作9位魅魔，消灭从四面八方蜂拥而至的敌人吧！灵活搭配各类技能的爽快肉鸽动作游戏，总共收录了48个场景和27套动画！

items.title: 键盘侠：键入即毁灭 Demo
items.short_description: 在璀璨星空与流星雨中快速键入，毁灭下落的字母！掌握主动技能与标记系统，触发爆炸、冰缓、额外加分等华丽特效.

items.title: 钱钱向钱冲
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 436 篇用户评测中有 70% 为好评。
items.short_description: 钱就是万能的。拥抱城市建设的混沌。饲养巨型怪物！观察弱小的冒险家们！用强大的法术和大自然最伟大的力量——金钱，让大自然顺从你的意愿。

items.title: 遗忘清单
items.short_description: 忘记，还是留下？ 这是一款用声音和回忆叙事的游戏。当你在现实中闭上眼睛，游戏中的记忆就会渐渐清晰。主人公将如何面对过去？她的结局只在你一念之间。

items.title: 逃离深渊的少女
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 81 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
items.short_description: 正在散步的废柴最强魔王“莉莉”，偶然发现一处出现得正好的“魔物栖息竖坑”。原本打算用特制的“超弱化诅咒拘束臂套”把路过的冒险者丢进去玩，结果——“诶？”反倒是废柴魔王莉莉自己掉进陷阱，直接坠入深渊……玩法很简单：往上爬就完事！你能爬到最顶端吗？！

items.title: 神经连接
items.short_description: 踏入一个微观世界，神经元在其中漂浮跳动。连接突触，引导递质，塑造网络流动。观察递质沿路径流动，点亮回路，神经世界将在你的连接下轻轻低语、焕发生机。

items.title: 液态围棋
items.short_description: 如果棋子能够任意摆放，围棋将会是什么样的？传统的定势还成立吗？如何做眼？进攻/防守是否更容易/困难了？这款游戏能够满足你的所有好奇心。来玩《液态围棋》，感受不一样的围棋体验！

items.title: 梦镜冒险者
items.short_description: 《梦镜冒险者》是一款在梦镜里战斗,自由探索,寻找宝箱。

items.title: 服务区模拟器
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 12 篇用户评测中有 58% 为好评。
items.short_description: 从一个小型路边站开始，发展成大型服务区。补充货架、销售燃料、经营餐厅和汽车旅馆，并保持环境整洁高效。通过合理管理，将小生意发展成热门目的地！

items.title: 无菌童年
items.short_description: 医院曾经把你写成病例。现在，你要找回被删掉的人生。

items.title: 无尽贪吃蛇
items.short_description: 这是一款轻松的贪吃蛇游戏，直到你选择挑战自己。先在 Endless 里放松游玩，再用连击、危险路线、Two-Body 控制、Strategist 规划、成长构筑、每日挑战、10 个 Boss 和 100 个成就考验自己。

items.title: 新花结实好时光
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 17 篇用户评测中有 82% 为好评。
items.short_description: 你是个充满活力的少年，正准备迎接新的开始！与丰富多彩的市民见面，和周围的人成为朋友，尽情享受丰富多彩的生活！

items.title: 断光のウルバスティア Demo
items.short_description: 断光のウルバスティアはシミュレーションRPGです。隣国や無法者との戦いを描いたダークな世界観のファンタジー、総勢35人の個性豊かな仲間と共に困難を切り開いていきます。デモバージョンでは全15ステージをプレイ可能となっています。

items.title: 开局养成满级修士
items.short_description: 🌱 养一群个性修仙者 搭配各式法器与法术神通，塑造每个修士独一无二的战斗流派。 壮大你的宗门势力，不断扩张领地版图。 自由改造地图地形。既可降下灭世灾劫，也能为麾下生灵赐予神物至宝，深刻影响世间所有生灵与势力。 ✨ 玩的就是天道模拟器

items.title: 女儿国的诅咒 The Curse of Womanland
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 81 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
items.short_description: 女儿国题材恋爱冒险文字游戏，你将穿越到女儿国，与神秘少女简灵相识，并逐步揭开女儿国背后血腥而黑暗的秘密。死亡、反抗还是沉沦？一切都取决你的选择。

items.title: 圣经问答测验
items.short_description: 与时间赛跑，挑战数百道圣经知识问答！考验你对圣经经文、著名人物、神迹奇事与比喻故事的掌握程度。适合基督徒社群与益智爱好者。

items.title: 咖啡店革命 | Cafe Revolution
items.short_description: 经营你自己的咖啡馆！接收顾客订单，冲煮美味咖啡，服务顾客，并将你的咖啡店发展成镇上最棒的去处。

items.title: 亚洲家长的上学之路 - 试玩版
items.short_description: 一款1-4人的在线联机合作冒险游戏。带你沉浸式体验亚洲父母当年上学路上的“史诗级”劫难。痛扁精神病黑熊，无视物理定律，还要挺过来自NPC“Tablo Escobar”的“精神暴击”——只要你一失败，他就会对你疯狂输出、无情吐槽！

items.title: 互联便签引擎 Demo
items.short_description: 这是游戏感知的随手记软件：记录的信息只属于当前进行的游戏。贴边隐藏，游戏内随时唤出；计算器、待办等游戏内一键使用。软件集成创意工坊，随时分享、下载便签；在游戏中与玩家实时聊天。

items.title: 乒乓行 Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款乒乓球运动题材的弹幕射击肉鸽游戏。玩家穿越至古代神魔世界，以球拍为武器，通过乒乓球攻击敌人，并需拾回乒乓球才能再次进攻，形成独特战斗节奏。游戏包含随机怪物的关卡，还包含篝火与商店系统，可构筑多样流派。乒乓球运动与神魔元素融合，带来新颖战斗体验。

items.title: 与舰同沉
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 165 篇用户评测中有 96% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在这款战略自走棋中设计一艘武装到牙齿的太空战舰。挑选超过 200 种物品，装备船体，并在异步 PvP 中释放它的火力。组合舰长与派系，打造离谱组合并制霸银河。重掷、购买、放置、祈祷。

items.title: Žolík
items.short_description: Classic Central European card game brought to Steam. Build melds, race to empty your hand, and outscore your friends. 2–4 players over Steam, or solo against AI bots. Three rule presets, custom rules, full Slovak + English.

items.title: a weird game about sausage Demo
items.short_description: 这是一个关于香肠的点击游戏

items.title: XorO
items.short_description: "XorO" is a 1vs1 fighting-inspired puzzle game that puts focus on the mind games by getting rid of mechanical, input-based complexity while also having a set of simple, easy to understand rules derived from familiar ideas of tic-tac-toe and rock-paper-scissors.

items.title: Xeno Finder
items.short_description: A local multiplayer social deduction game for friends—featuring 8 categories and 240 unique expressions to keep every round fresh.

items.title: Winemaker Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 踏入中世纪地中海，过上酿酒师的生活。从照料葡萄园到收获、酿酒和贸易，每一个决定都塑造着你的工艺。你会创造出最精致、最有价值的葡萄酒吗？🍷

items.title: Wayward Crown Demo
items.short_description: Wayward Crown 试玩版 — 游戏仍在早期开发中，此版本用于收集玩家反馈与建议。内容有限且可能存在 BUG。未来将新增更多冒险者、怪物、建筑与技能。感谢您的试玩与宝贵意见！

items.title: Visual novel: Shadows of Ravenhall Castle
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 12 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: An inheritance. An old castle among mist-covered hills. Elizabeth Gray thought she only had to arrive, inspect Ravenhall, and sign a few papers. But from the very first night, it becomes clear: the castle came to her for a reason, and its silence hides a secret that will not be easy to escape.

items.title: VamPigo
items.short_description: Collect special Vampig creatures, use their elemental charge-carrying abilities to solve puzzles, fight factory robots, avoid security traps and defeat the evil Manager within the walls of a vampire weapons factory.

items.title: Unanswered
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 31 篇用户评测中有 93% 为好评。
items.short_description: 你在一个陌生的地方醒来，不知道自己是谁、身在何处，也不知道是如何来到这里的。你被困在一个不断扭曲、企图摧毁你理智的环境中，唯一的出路就是深入未知，直面你大脑极力想要隐藏的骇人过往。

items.title: Tulip Season Demo
items.short_description: 在这款农场模拟游戏中，以郁金香为颜料，以花田为画布，绘制你的策略与休闲之作。规划种植，让所有花和谐排布，在整片花田上构成优雅的样式。不论是每日仔细照料，还是在休闲模式下任其盛放，你的目标很简单：打造值得国王一观的美景。

items.title: Total RepeAt
items.short_description: Sci-fi survival shooter. The ship is wrecked. you are alone 340,000 colonists disappeared. Repair your ship before the VOID fleet arrives - and uncover a secret the UEF would kill to bury.

items.title: There's Always a Madman: V.I.C.T.O.R. Demo
items.short_description: Secret agent Franklin Benjamin will stop at nothing to save the world. In this single-player interactive spy novel, you play as his greatest adversaries - can the criminal enterprise known as V.I.C.T.O.R. defeat the only man standing between them and world domination? To the VICTOR go the spoils!

items.title: The Watching Woods: The Friend Demo
items.short_description: 为了融入新学校，索尼娅结识了一群自称为乡村女巫的女孩。在完成她们交予的任务时，她发现这些任务一次比一次离奇、诡异和残酷。为了被接纳，她究竟会走多远？

items.title: The Pale Mimic Demo
items.short_description: 《The Pale Mimic》是一款以阿拉斯加荒野为背景的氛围恐怖游戏。作为一名在逃的高级通缉犯，你和你的爱犬在寒冷的森林中相依为命，直到不速之客的到来。

items.title: The Melty Way
items.short_description: 你移动，你融化。操控一个被模拟为真实液体的史莱姆，每一次移动都会消耗自身的一部分。利用质量滑行、缩小并突破像素级危险，在这款强调体型管理的精准平台游戏中生存。

items.title: The Haunted Spot 2
items.short_description: The Haunted Spot is a 2D top-down survival horror game based on the story of a paranormal enthusiast called Jack who arrived at a century-old abandoned haunted house to experience the paranormal.

items.title: The Forgotten Nightmare Series
items.short_description: A classic-style text adventure game spanning three chapters. Enter verb/noun commands via keyboard, mouse, or game controller to explore, collect items, and solve puzzles in a post-apocalyptic, Christian-themed story. Features an auto-drawing map and hint system.

items.title: The Devil's Graveyard: A PIGSKIN Demo
items.short_description: The Devil’s Graveyard: A PIGSKIN Demo places you in the shoes of Ricky, an angsty teenager dared to spend Halloween night in a haunted cemetery. As he explores Sugarwood Cemetery—known by locals as The Devil’s Graveyard—a reckless challenge turns into a descent into something far more sinister.

items.title: The Cradle of Life Demo
items.short_description: A brutal turn-based tactical RPG where you fight on a grid, manage hunger and sanity, and uncover a world breaking apart. Your choices are permanent and the gods are always watching. Who will you serve?

items.title: The Bed Above My Head Demo
items.short_description: You’re playing a game in the dark. Something in your room is not. In this Sit & Survive type psychological horror game, you're a child playing on your console, while something roams your room. Observe your surroundings, listen carefully and manage your stress to survive this nightmarish night.

items.title: The Anomaly Inspector
items.short_description: You're an Anomaly Inspector working the night shift at a remote facility. Walk through each area, report what's wrong at the terminal—or report that everything is clear. But as the night progresses, the anomalies become harder to ignore. Can you survive until morning?

items.title: The Adventures of Sir Kicksalot
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 258 篇用户评测中有 98% 为好评。
items.short_description: 这是一款第一人称动作游戏，你可以通过多种方式击败敌人：无论是武器、法术、潜行，还是使用战术将他们一脚踢进致命尖刺。

items.title: That's An Order Ensign
items.short_description: Complete a slew of mundane and dangerous tasks, Do it quick or you're dismissed! Try to stay alive, but do your job. Because after all... That's an order, ensign!

items.title: Ten Rings 1
items.short_description: 《十戒》是一款回合制 RPG。你的角色可以同时装备十枚戒指，并通过戒指获得属性、技能和被动效果。挑战敌人、赚取金币、购买新戒指，组合出属于自己的战斗流派。

items.title: Team Flashy Virus
items.short_description: Slow down time, defy gravity, and weave through the chaos as you bounce off bullets and enemies to survive. You are one shot, but not weaponless.

items.title: Tank POV
items.short_description: You play as a little tank in a psychological horror game set in a bizarre world where tanks can devour each other, and are even treated as meat. Grilled, cooked, and served like ordinary food.

items.title: Sweet Land Survival Demo
items.short_description: Sweet Land Survival is a colorful survival game in a world made of sweets! But don't let the cute visuals fool you. The island is treacherous: to survive another day, you'll have to gather resources and fight monsters. Gather a team of loyal companions to make survival more fun!

items.title: Steel Artery: Train City Builder
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 158 篇用户评测中有 65% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在这款蒸汽朋克幻想风格的列车城市建造游戏中，打造一座在轨道上奔行的活力都市。管理拥有数千名自主公民的多种族殖民地，平衡他们的需求，经营经济，规划物流，并探索遥远的地区，以确保帝国的繁荣。

items.title: Stealth Operative Syn: Virtual Training Demo
items.short_description: Synthia “Syn” is training to become a Stealth Operative. In order to do so, she trains in the Virtual Simulation Room. Use different tactics and techniques to sneak past the guards and obstacles. Finish every level to complete your virtual training!

items.title: Star Raker Demo
items.short_description: Welcome to Star Raker, a multiplayer social deduction for 4 to 12 players. Take part in a psychological experiment aboard an evacuation ship. Use logic, communication, and social engineering to save the gene pool or survive the paranoia of hidden betrayal.

items.title: Soul Machine
items.short_description: 组装你的终极机甲，迎战成群的机器人。在这款狂热的双摇杆肉鸽射击游戏中，组合毁灭性的武器，创造协同效应，收集零件以在“虫群”中生存。你的底盘能撑得住吗？

items.title: Slash The Tower
items.short_description: Slash the Tower is a turn-based climb: read foe intent & energy; gold-shop between fights; unlock floors/bosses on the map—rerun at tougher difficulties.

items.title: Skrrt Racing
items.short_description: Race through stylized old school arcade levels, unlock JDM inspired cars and upgrade performance parts, visual evolution and customization. Beat bosses, evolve your build, and push into infinite mode in this fully offline 2D racing game.

items.title: Skigill
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 123 篇用户评测中有 76% 为好评。
items.short_description: Fight! Collect! Explore! Experiment! Survive! Master the SKIGILL, a large skill tree spanning the entire battleground, to power your character and survive waves of enemies. Unlock upgrades, weapons, and characters in a meta sigil after each game, and maybe you'll see the end!

items.title: Simple Fantasy
items.short_description: Hi this game is my attempt at an amalgamation of puzzle solving. Turn-Based Combat with Decision Based Progression, Open World Non-Linear Exploration Quests and Collectables. Save Anywhere. Collect creatures for a game inside a game.

items.title: Sic Bo Macau: The Ultimate Casino Dice Game
items.short_description: Casino-grade Sic Bo simulator with real payout tables — Standard, Macau, Atlantic City, Australia, and Super with multipliers up to 1000×. Infinite virtual chips, zero microtransactions. Built for players who want to learn strategy, test variance, or just roll the dice in peace.

items.title: SiNiSistar 2
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 829 篇用户评测中有 91% 为好评。
items.short_description: 化身退魔修女，踏足正在灭亡的异世界。以精致的像素画绘制而成的末日般的世界。恶心恐怖地蠕动着的异形怪物。然后是无数次阻挡住主角的强大boss——描绘抵抗着破灭与绝望，祓除污秽的修女的冒险的暗黑动作RPG。

items.title: Shroomveil Demo
items.short_description: Shroomveil is a real-time combat, Action RPG, with character progression, skills, and gear upgrades. Set in a magical, mushroom-filled world full of danger and discovery, you'll explore a beautiful fantasy land, find and defend villages, equip warriors, clear dungeons, defeat bosses, and bring peace

items.title: Shout League
items.short_description: 欢迎来到 Shout League —— 一款你必须对着麦克风对球大喊的足球游戏！和朋友一起大喊，对朋友大喊，随便大喊！在线游玩，组队并进球！

items.title: Shear Heaven Demo
items.short_description: A young soul lands in Heaven by chance, but he doesn't belong here. To find his way home, he'll need wool. A lot of wool! Shear Heaven is a cozy 3D voxel platformer set among floating sky islands; a playground built for wonder, fluffy sheep, and finding your way back to the people you love.

items.title: Severed Light
items.short_description: SEVERED LIGHT is an ARPG where you slay demons, Battle epic bosses, then go fishing and find the perfect spot for your house plant. Loot, explore, quest, kill and chill... in no specific order.

items.title: Seed Defender
items.short_description: Click your way to victory in this tower defense strategy game. Swarmed by chickens trying to steal your hard-earned seeds, click them to death and collect their feathers. Then, purchase defenses with those feathers to fend off the hoards that are to come.

items.title: Seafarer Demo
items.short_description: SEAFARER is a game set in the age of sailships where you play as a young captain commanding a merchant ship in search of fame and fortune. This demo includes a small portion of the game world where players can engage in trade, combat and exploration.

items.title: Scientific project: Optic Demo
items.short_description: Scientific Project: Optic is a first-person puzzle game that guides you through the history of optical science, from its philosophical origins to our modern understanding. Master the nature of light and solve puzzles inspired by real scientific discoveries.

items.title: Samota Demo
items.short_description: Samota is a Klondike roguelike deckbuilder. You have one try per round to build the ultimate synergistic stack. Carefully decide which card to combine with which effect, which card to play or keep for later reward, which cover that synergize well, all to make the number goes bigger and bigger!

items.title: SHULERO – Dice Roguelike Demo
items.short_description: 受 Yacht 启发的 Roguelike（快艇骰子）。掷骰子。打造组合。击败 Boss。作弊才能赢。

items.title: Raiders Rise Demo
items.short_description: Explore hostile planets, face endless hordes of devourers, collect crystals, and upgrade your equipment. Choose the hero that best suits your playstyle, cooperate with your allies to survive… or betray the other team at the perfect moment and claim victory.

items.title: ROOTKIT://死 (ROOTKIT PROTOCOL DEATH) Demo
items.short_description: Cyberpunk extraction runner with bhop movement. Speed determines whether enemies can hit you. Race your own ghost through gauntlet levels, slide under barriers, chain crouch-bhops on ramps, and extract before the system catches up.

items.title: RIPCORE Demo
items.short_description: 杀戮。进化。循环。 在这款高能 Roguelike FPS 中战翻地狱 9 层。通过叠加升级打造逆天 Build，粉碎成千上万的恶魔并击败传奇 BOSS。地狱已满——开工清理。

items.title: Quod Erat Demonstrandum Demo
items.short_description: Discover the challenging fun of validating logical proofs, beginning with simple propositional calculus and ending with complex, multi-domain propositional calculus. Prove yourself to be a master of logical thinking!

items.title: Push The Cart Together
items.short_description: 货物已装好，推车已就绪，客户正在等待。独自一人或与朋友一起，把货物推到终点。 物理规则和世界都不会对你友好。货物会多次爆炸——你们也是。 这会非常困难，但别担心……总有一天会成功的。对吧？

items.title: PlayZone
items.short_description: PlayZone是一款多人派对游戏，集合多种经典玩法与社交互动，轻松有趣，支持个性化装扮和奖励系统，快来和朋友一起玩吧！

items.title: Pin Money Demo
items.short_description: 把一家破旧的霓虹保龄球馆打造成十亿美元的全垒打帝国。叠加荒谬的倍率、解锁强力升级、最多同时经营7条球道，并在这款放置/递增式保龄球游戏中击穿整个经济系统。

items.title: Pieces of the Kingdom Demo
items.short_description: 如果国际象棋...是一款Roguelite呢？集结你的队伍，在这个奇幻战术版国际象棋中杀出一条血路。掠夺史诗装备，招募拥有独特能力的强力棋子，运筹帷幄走向胜利。

items.title: Physics Play
items.short_description: Experience a fun and simple physics simulation.

items.title: Peril in Prymkos Demo
items.short_description: Embark on a quest through the magical world of Prymkos. Explore ancient ruins, uncover hidden secrets, and face the mysterious Priests of Shaana in this story-driven fantasy RPG.

items.title: Pack my Order Demo
items.short_description: Pack My Order is a cozy online shopping simulator. Fill your cart based on the customers' lists and budgets, and enjoy the process without any rush. Cute animations, pleasant sounds, and a calm pace await you. No timers — the perfect way to clear your mind after a long day.

items.title: Overdue Demo
items.short_description: Over due is a first person stealth-action shooter where you play as freelance mercenary. What begins as a standard extraction mission spirals into a fight to stop a dictator from erasing memes and controlling free thought. This bite-sized demo serves as the intro to the main game.

items.title: Only Up: Chan Chained Together
items.short_description: Only Up: Chans Together 是一款考验策略、合作精神与团队配合的游戏。只有那些愿意完全信任伙伴的玩家，才能成功登顶，赢得自由。你能证明自己值得获得那把通往巅峰的钥匙吗？

items.title: ORE x TRACTOR Demo
items.short_description: ORE x TRACTOR is a short, incremental game about demolishing space rocks with a variety of weaponry.

items.title: Nova Fleet Demo
items.short_description: A short incremental space game about building and expanding a mining fleet. Destroy asteroids, collect resources, and upgrade your ships to mine faster and extract more with every run.

items.title: No One Left To Die
items.short_description: A generation ship with an unclear objective, housing an expendable crew tasked with waking up passengers to complete the mission... No One Left To Die is a short, sci-fi, action-puzzle-platformer that can be completed solo or with friends in a nuanced cooperative and competitive environment.

items.title: Nightmariners
items.short_description: NightMariners 是一款合作恐怖冒险游戏。你将航行于黑暗海域，探索被诅咒的岛屿，并进入危险的洞穴

items.title: Neophyte
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 640 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
items.short_description: A mini topdown action roguelike with chaotic spell-slinging hack-n-slash combat. Collect spells, choose perks and discover powerful synergies to become an unstoppable monster-slaying wizard.

items.title: Nano Squadron
items.short_description: Manage your shields, evolve your ship, defend Earth. Nano Squadron is a top-down space roguelite where every run brings new upgrades and every mistake leaves you exposed.

items.title: NRDominó
items.short_description: Classic domino gameplay with for local and online matches.

items.title: Mythic Manager Demo
items.short_description: The front office sports experience — but for an MMORPG guild. Scout talent, manage your roster, win arena tournaments, build raid teams, and climb the rankings one boss kill at a time.

items.title: My Scout Life
items.short_description: 发现隐藏的天才，挖掘他们的潜力，在最佳时机将其出售。在《My Scout Life》中，你就是球探——在所有人之前找到年轻的天才球员。建立你的声誉，主宰转会市场！

items.title: My Little Ocean Demo
items.short_description: 潜入互动式的海洋模拟世界。引领你的鱼群寻找食物与安全地带，观察它们嬉戏漫游，在这片温馨的小小海洋中共同享受欢乐时光。

items.title: Mutation Demo
items.short_description: 当主角从梦中醒来时，一切都变了，他将独自对抗一整所庄园的行尸走肉，并发掘其背后的惊天秘密。

items.title: Mushroom Simulator Co-op
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 18 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: You're a mushroom. Your friends are mushrooms too. Grow big, enjoy the rain, watch out for worms and the forager with a basket. No quests, no bosses. Just you, the forest, and that worm that crawled up at the wrong moment again.

items.title: Moventure
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 122 篇用户评测中有 80% 为好评。
items.short_description: 100种动作，2个按键，0教程。 掌握隐藏在方向键和2个按键中的庞大动作库。在终极movelike高精度平台游戏中征服100+关卡。

items.title: Minimon: Tiny Idle Tactics Demo
items.short_description: A tiny idle monster-tamer that sits quietly in the corner of your screen. While you go about your day they fight for loot, levels, and glory.

items.title: Midnight Kebab
items.short_description: 你经营一家深夜餐厅，通过神秘机器控制辐射，影响顾客的味觉和行为。信号过弱真相显现，过强则引发疾病、攻击和调查。保持平衡，才能继续营业。

items.title: MicroFab
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 15 篇用户评测中有 80% 为好评。
items.short_description: Build automated chip factories in a post-collapse 2047. Process silicon wafers, research advanced tech, and scale from basic processors to legendary quantum chips. Optimize your production lines, outmaneuver mega-corps, and dominate the semiconductor market.

items.title: Memories Loaming, November
items.short_description: A game about possession from the inside. A single player horror/puzzle adventure set in a forgotten stretch of Labrador, Canada. The environments change between visits, rewarding and punishing familiarity. Also, there's a bear. Eventually, you might be remembered too.

items.title: MayDay MayDie Demo
items.short_description: 最多支持8人的实时背叛与行动游戏。乘客全力完成任务以求迫降，而潜伏的劫机者则暗中破坏，企图让飞机坠毁。没有投票，只有纯粹的猜忌与疯狂！

items.title: Manaclysm Demo
items.short_description: Manaclysm is a PvP brawler where up to 60 mages wage war across realms fractured by magic. Slay enemy mages to upgrade your mana and spell arsenal. Invite friends to a private game, or hop into ranked matchmaking for some massive brawls! This demo has full online multiplayer limited to 8 players.

items.title: MEOWMI: City Cat Chaos Demo
items.short_description: 化身一只活泼的小猫，探索温馨的开放世界城市——攀爬屋顶、发现秘密、自定义你的猫咪，并在这个充满魅力的沙盒冒险中帮助朋友。

items.title: Lost Totem Trajipon: Homecoming
items.short_description: Explore the ultra-frightening outskirts of Trajipon in this short but cryptic adventure! Find your car keys - if you can stomach the gruesome beings standing in your way.

items.title: Lost Totem Trajipon!
items.short_description: Capture, command, and sacrifice occult mutants in a delightfully desolate, ultra-morbid turn-based RPG! It'll take a true Minion Master to unravel the treachery that's tying up Trajipon in this entirely above-board ROM we found at a garage sale!

items.title: Lost Diver Demo
items.short_description: A homeless man finds a treasure map on the beach, sparking a new life. Dive into the deep to find valuable sunken objects, upgrade your gear—including your metal detector, oar, and oxygen tube—and uncover hidden mini-maps to find even greater treasures in this relaxing simulation game.

items.title: Liminal Sick Pizza Blue
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 11 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 制作披萨，送去外卖。单人轮班这份工作的痛苦之处，就在于送餐地点竟然是“边缘空间”……！一款重视剧情的3D恐怖游戏。只有在无限空间中才会诞生的“最坏之物”存在着。你知道那是什么吗？等你明白的时候，一切都已经太迟了。

items.title: Leafy Greenz
items.short_description: Leafy Greenz is a game where you play as Leafy, who gets eaten by a Koala. You must make your way throughout the digestive tract of the Koala, playing through a series of minigames and attempting to achieve a high score.

items.title: Last Known Vector
items.short_description: Last Known Vector is a sci-fi horror game where you travel between a space station and SOS signals. Your aging ship often breaks down, so keep it in good condition. But failures aren’t your only threat. In space, anomalies appear, and when they do, avoid the darkness at all costs.

items.title: Kill Source: Neon Hemorrhage
items.short_description: 一款残酷硬核的弹幕分数挑战射击游戏，包含 Boss Rush 和无尽竞技场模式。没有刷取，也没有没完没了的解锁流程，只有你独自迎战近乎不可能的绝境。

items.title: KharkivVision 2035 Demo
items.short_description: This is an atmospheric demo version of the narrative indie game KharkivVision 2035 with open-world elements, dedicated to relocation, change, and a look into the future.

items.title: Karkaba
items.short_description: Choose from 10 iconic Middle Eastern fighters and battle across legendary Arab stages. Karkaba is a deep, skill based fighting game featuring smooth 60 FPS combat, rollback netcode online multiplayer, local battles with friends, and competitive online play.

items.title: Jackpot Colosseum Demo
items.short_description: Step into the arena in this fast-paced roguelike deckbuilder! Instead of cards, you build the ultimate deadly slot machine. Draft unique symbols, trigger massive synergy combos, and survive endless waves of gladiators. Spin the reels, scale the Bronze League, and break the bank!

items.title: Invasion of the Lizard People
items.short_description: 1–4 player co-op survival where you fight through waves of enemies, rack up kills, and collect powerful pickups to stay alive as long as possible. Fast-paced, chaotic runs push your limits every time.

items.title: Imperial Wager: The Shattered Crown of Augustus Demo
items.short_description: Rule a dark-age feudal empire in this unconventional grand strategy game. Wager your treasury, manage unruly vassals, and use ancient, unpredictable relics to rig the odds of war. Draft edicts, suppress peasant revolts, and gamble everything to reforge the name of Augustus.

items.title: Hyperwurm is back!
items.short_description: 一台赛博蠕虫引擎在致命迷宫中咆哮前进。 引导不断成长的生物穿过狭窄走廊，并偶尔面对 Boss —— 使用鼠标、手柄或键盘 ……或者让 AI 代理接管控制。

items.title: Hamstr Protocol Demo
items.short_description: This free demo gives you a taste of the full Hamstr Protocol experience. Set up your first rig, get your hamster running, and mine your first HAM. The operation starts small — but the potential is anything but.

items.title: Halls of Nyarlathotep
items.short_description: Explore the shifting labyrinths of the Dreamlands in this Lovecraftian roguelite FPS, where every shot, step, and secret chips away at your sanity as you face eldritch horrors and ancient Outer Gods.

items.title: HYPERWIRED Demo
items.short_description: Pilot a ship with a charger hanging. Explore an ever-changing space an plug to recharge your energy while surviving the enemy breach in this cable-like space shooter with roguelike elements and plugged resource management.

items.title: GummyGom Delivery Demo
items.short_description: 与你的啫喱熊伙伴们一起搬运板上的货物吧！每个人的动作都会影响板子的平衡，哪怕是一个小小的失误也可能让一切崩溃。

items.title: Gold ’n Goal Demo
items.short_description: Gold ’n Goal 是一款荒诞的增量足球游戏，在这里你会打进离谱数量的进球、赚取丰厚的€，并把你的球队训练成宇宙冠军！

items.title: Global Football
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 12 篇用户评测中有 91% 为好评。
items.short_description: Global Football is a multiplayer football game focused on real skill, teamwork, and identity. Here, each player controls a single athlete on the field — not an entire team. No pay-to-win. No scripts. Victory depends solely on your game awareness, technique, and team chemistry.

items.title: Galaxy Grinder Incremental
items.short_description: Galaxy Grinder 是一款快节奏的增量游戏，您可以使用光标和武器摧毁行星和小行星。赚取资源，解锁新世界，并在每次运行之间通过升级、技能和强化变得更强。

items.title: Furry Necromancer 💀
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 18 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: You died, but I got good news and bad news for you. The good news - you have been resurrected, the bad news - you have been resurrected by a necromancer who has some "special" plans for you (although it might not be "bad news" at all...)

items.title: Fluff Up Demo
items.short_description: 《Fluff Up》是一款有趣且充满挑战性的游戏，你需要控制好你的速度，管理好你的体力，操控一只小胖鸟穿梭在奇幻的云海，借助一片片云朵飞上最高的天空！

items.title: Evil Pongon Game Demo
items.short_description: A fast-paced 2D platformer where you dash, wall-jump, and speedrun through levels while avoiding enemies that steal your riches. Shatter hourglasses to trigger countdown escapes from the wall-phasing ENPHOSO, and face bosses in Undertale-style bullet-hell battles.

items.title: Evil Doll 2
items.short_description: You awaken, trapped in a dark, blood-stained house. A terrifying puppet hunts you. Solve puzzles, find tools, and unlock the front door to escape. But be quiet, it hears everything. Uncover the house's dark secrets before the Evil Doll finds you.

items.title: Entiled
items.short_description: Entiled is an infinite spatial tile clearing puzzle game built for endless replayability. Clear tiles without collisions, build massive multipliers, compete on Steam Leaderboards, and create, share, and play community made puzzles through the Steam Workshop. Climb the Ranked Steam Leaderboards.

items.title: Durak Online by Pokerist
items.short_description: Play the best Durak Online game with real players for free! Invite friends, choose your game mode, and enjoy fantastic graphics on any device.

potential_items.title: 矮人吞山
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 53 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 矮人对黄金充满渴望，没有任何一座高山能阻挡他们的脚步！在这款轻松有趣的放置类游戏中，开采宝藏、发掘神器、升级矮人，去吞噬一座又一座更雄伟的山峰。

potential_items.title: 海参大作战
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 112 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 海参将拯救地球——海参大作战 (NAMAKORIUM)是一款最多支持4人一起游玩的热闹合作型即时战略游戏。指挥已逝人类留下的“海洋清洁工”海参，一起清扫被污染的海洋吧！

potential_items.title: 末日车队
potential_items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 101 篇用户评测中有 68% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 在《末日车队》中体验末日生存的挑战！被僵尸侵袭的末日废土上，你将带领幸存者车队，驾驶房车，穿越广阔的世界，在末日废土中努力求生。收集资源，打造卡组，与僵尸战斗，探索开放世界，升级房车，制作武器，寻找末日的真相，重建人类文明！

potential_items.title: Crazy Oddballs: Idle RPG
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 277 篇用户评测中有 83% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Build your oddball team, grind endless loot, and optimize ridiculous gear combinations in a chaotic idle RPG with guild battles, PvP, and long-term progression.

potential_items.title: 男神模拟器
potential_items.review_summary: 好评如潮 此游戏的 672 篇用户评测中有 98% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 一名困于现实的青年，意外穿越回学生时代，并觉醒时空恋爱战略系统。 在僚机“童锦程”的辅助下，你将跨越青涩校园与风云职场，用未来记忆改写命运，同时与七位不同人生阶段的女孩展开宿命纠缠—— 从教室到写字楼，从电单车到AMG，见证她们从少女蜕变为行业翘楚，而你能否在时空交错中，找到爱情与事业的最优解？

potential_items.title: 钱钱向钱冲
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 436 篇用户评测中有 70% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 钱就是万能的。拥抱城市建设的混沌。饲养巨型怪物！观察弱小的冒险家们！用强大的法术和大自然最伟大的力量——金钱，让大自然顺从你的意愿。

potential_items.title: 逃离深渊的少女
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 81 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 正在散步的废柴最强魔王“莉莉”，偶然发现一处出现得正好的“魔物栖息竖坑”。原本打算用特制的“超弱化诅咒拘束臂套”把路过的冒险者丢进去玩，结果——“诶？”反倒是废柴魔王莉莉自己掉进陷阱，直接坠入深渊……玩法很简单：往上爬就完事！你能爬到最顶端吗？！

potential_items.title: 女儿国的诅咒 The Curse of Womanland
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 81 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 女儿国题材恋爱冒险文字游戏，你将穿越到女儿国，与神秘少女简灵相识，并逐步揭开女儿国背后血腥而黑暗的秘密。死亡、反抗还是沉沦？一切都取决你的选择。

potential_items.title: 与舰同沉
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 166 篇用户评测中有 96% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 在这款战略自走棋中设计一艘武装到牙齿的太空战舰。挑选超过 200 种物品，装备船体，并在异步 PvP 中释放它的火力。组合舰长与派系，打造离谱组合并制霸银河。重掷、购买、放置、祈祷。

potential_items.title: The Adventures of Sir Kicksalot
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 258 篇用户评测中有 98% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 这是一款第一人称动作游戏，你可以通过多种方式击败敌人：无论是武器、法术、潜行，还是使用战术将他们一脚踢进致命尖刺。

potential_items.title: Steel Artery: Train City Builder
potential_items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 158 篇用户评测中有 65% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 在这款蒸汽朋克幻想风格的列车城市建造游戏中，打造一座在轨道上奔行的活力都市。管理拥有数千名自主公民的多种族殖民地，平衡他们的需求，经营经济，规划物流，并探索遥远的地区，以确保帝国的繁荣。

potential_items.title: Skigill
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 123 篇用户评测中有 76% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Fight! Collect! Explore! Experiment! Survive! Master the SKIGILL, a large skill tree spanning the entire battleground, to power your character and survive waves of enemies. Unlock upgrades, weapons, and characters in a meta sigil after each game, and maybe you'll see the end!

potential_items.title: SiNiSistar 2
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 825 篇用户评测中有 91% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 化身退魔修女，踏足正在灭亡的异世界。以精致的像素画绘制而成的末日般的世界。恶心恐怖地蠕动着的异形怪物。然后是无数次阻挡住主角的强大boss——描绘抵抗着破灭与绝望，祓除污秽的修女的冒险的暗黑动作RPG。

potential_items.title: Neophyte
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 640 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: A mini topdown action roguelike with chaotic spell-slinging hack-n-slash combat. Collect spells, choose perks and discover powerful synergies to become an unstoppable monster-slaying wizard.
